industries.name: Spark Plugs & Ignition Systems
uses: Iridium spark plug electrodes: fine-wire iridium or iridium-rhodium alloy center electrode tips (0.4–0.6mm diameter) in premium spark plugs provide exceptional wear resistance — iridium's melting point (2446°C) and hardness prevent electrode erosion from repeated spark discharge
Iridium spark plugs last 100,000–160,000 km versus 30,000–50,000 km for copper plugs and 60,000 km for platinum — premium longevity justifying iridium's higher cost in modern vehicles

Double iridium spark plugs (iridium center and iridium ground electrode) becoming standard equipment in high-performance and direct-injection gasoline engines where cylinder pressures demand greater electrode durability

Aircraft piston engine spark plugs: aviation spark plugs use iridium-alloy electrodes to ensure reliability over thousands of flight hours in aircraft engines certified for extended TBO (time between overhaul)

companies.name: NGK Spark Plug (NGK Ignition Parts)
companies.use: World's largest spark plug manufacturer and major iridium consumer. Produces Iridium IX and Laser Iridium premium spark plugs with fine-wire iridium-alloy electrodes. Consumes significant iridium annually across billions of spark plugs produced.

companies.name: Denso Corporation
companies.use: Major spark plug manufacturer producing Iridium Power and Iridium TT premium spark plugs with iridium center electrodes for OEM installation and aftermarket replacement in vehicles globally.

companies.name: Robert Bosch GmbH
companies.use: Major spark plug producer. Produces Iridium Fusion spark plugs with iridium-alloyed center electrodes for extended service intervals in European and North American automotive markets.

industries.name: Industrial Electrodes & Chemical Processing
uses: Iridium oxide (IrO₂) and Ir-Ru mixed oxide coatings on titanium electrodes for proton exchange membrane (PEM) water electrolysis for green hydrogen production — iridium is the only practically usable anode catalyst for oxygen evolution in the acidic PEM environment

IrO₂ dimensionally stable anodes (DSA) for chlor-alkali electrolysis producing chlorine and caustic soda — iridium provides higher efficiency and corrosion resistance than ruthenium-only coatings in the most demanding chlor-alkali applications

Iridium crucibles for crystal growth of laser and scintillator crystals (YAG, LGS, BGO) at temperatures above platinum's limit — iridium's 2446°C melting point and oxidation resistance enable crystal growth above 1800°C
Electrochlorination systems using IrO₂-coated electrodes for on-site hypochlorite generation — water treatment, ballast water treatment, and pool disinfection

companies.name: Nel Hydrogen (Nel ASA)
companies.use: Major PEM electrolyzer manufacturer for green hydrogen production. Uses IrO₂-coated titanium electrodes (iridium loading ~2–3 mg/cm²) as the anode catalyst for the oxygen evolution reaction in acidic PEM electrolyte.

companies.name: ITM Power
companies.use: Major PEM electrolyzer manufacturer. Uses iridium-based anode electrocatalysts in its HGAS and HEVO PEM electrolyzer stacks for green hydrogen production at industrial scale.

industries.name: Specialty Alloys & Standards
uses: Platinum-iridium (90Pt-10Ir) alloy was the material of the International Prototype Kilogram (IPK) — the definition of the kilogram from 1889 to 2019. Iridium hardened platinum for the standard without affecting its chemical inertness

Iridium-192 (¹⁹²Ir, t½ = 73.8 days) as a gamma radiography source for industrial NDT (non-destructive testing) of welds, pipelines, and castings — the most widely used industrial gamma source for weld inspection in oil & gas, aerospace, and construction
Iridium-192 brachytherapy seeds for prostate cancer and other localized tumor treatment — high-dose-rate (HDR) brachytherapy using ¹⁹²Ir afterloading systems
Os-Ir and Pt-Ir alloys for geodetic survey instruments, compass bearings, and precision scientific weights requiring dimensional stability and corrosion resistance

companies.name: GE Inspection Technologies (Baker Hughes)
companies.use: Major industrial radiography equipment and source supplier. Provides ¹⁹²Ir gamma sources in sealed source form for weld inspection of offshore pipelines, refinery pressure vessels, and structural steel welds globally.

companies.name: Eckert & Ziegler
companies.use: Major medical isotope producer manufacturing ¹⁹²Ir HDR brachytherapy sources for prostate cancer, cervical cancer, and other localized tumor treatment at hospitals and cancer centers globally.
